geometric_interpretation.claim_boundary: This is an alternative AB3 candidate only. It does not replace I5, does not change the frozen thresholds, and does not open reward, semantic choice, agency, native support, sentience, Phase 8, or ant ecology.
geometric_interpretation.margin_difference: The original I5 maintenance basin had min support/coherence 10.0, margin 0.15 above the 9.85 floor. I5-A has min support/coherence 11.0, margin 1.15 above the same floor.
geometric_interpretation.short_read: I5-A reuses the LGRC fixture but declares a different source-current maintenance basin over high-support optional target nodes [1, 5, 9].

purpose: produce an alternative high-margin source-current optional continuation set without replacing I5
